nodes.label: AI customization and adaptability
nodes.label_negative: AI as fully autonomous and reliable
nodes.grounding_span: I need to use AI as a template and then alter its output to be more specific or tailored

nodes.label: AI as collaborative partner
nodes.label_negative: AI as fully delegated independent agent
nodes.grounding_span: Definitely collaborate, although it would be great to be able to fully delegate

nodes.label: AI up-to-date knowledge
nodes.grounding_span: it may not be up to date with the latest Dfe Guidance, so I can't fully rely on it's knowledge

nodes.label: AI for mundane tasks
nodes.grounding_span: If I can learn to manage using AI for more mundane and time consuming tasks this would allow me to spend more time on projects that AI can't fully help with

nodes.label: Quality of output
nodes.grounding_span: alter its output to be more specific or tailored for our needs

nodes.label: Human-centered engagement
nodes.grounding_span: spend more time on projects that AI can't fully help with (like fundraising, or interviewing children)

nodes.label: Cautious reliance due to knowledge gaps
nodes.grounding_span: I can't fully rely on it's knowledge

nodes.label: Optimism about AI for career advancement
nodes.grounding_span: I view it as my role is evolving into one of managing AI

nodes.label: Collaborative iterative refinement — works back and forth with AI
nodes.grounding_span: Collaboration comes from me refining the response to something useable

nodes.label: Proactive initiative — adopts AI independently before workplace training
nodes.grounding_span: I use AI through my own initiative
